title: Opening Narration
readAloud:
Welcome to Session Zero.

Tonight is not about fighting monsters, finding treasure, or surviving deadly jungles.

Not yet.

Tonight is about creating the heroes who will one day become part of those stories.

We are going to build your characters, learn how the game works, get comfortable using Foundry, and most importantly decide who these people are.

Every great adventure starts somewhere.

A legendary warrior was once someone picking up a weapon for the first time.

A powerful wizard once struggled with their first spell.

A famous hero was once just a traveller making a choice.

Tonight we discover:

Who are you?
Where did you come from?
What matters to you?
And when adventure finally calls...

Why will you answer?

Welcome to Dungeons & Dragons.

Welcome to the beginning of your story.
